landing.description: A platform to quickly find tattoo artists based on your ideas. Describe your design, and the best artists will offer you their prices.
landing.master_desc: Get hot leads from clients without spending on ads.
landing.client_desc: Describe your idea once, and the best artists in town will offer their designs.

guide.master_slide1_desc: Clients leave their ideas, you see them in your feed and can offer your services and price.
guide.master_slide2_desc: The more successfully completed works, the higher your rating and trust from new clients.
guide.client_slide1_desc: You don't need to text every artist separately. Just describe your idea here.
guide.client_slide2_desc: Artists will contact you themselves. Check their portfolios, reviews, and prices to pick the perfect candidate.
guide.shield_desc: Verified artists receive a special trust badge. Upload your portfolio and certificates to get verified.
guide.client_shield_desc: Look for this badge next to an artist's name—it means we have verified their documents and portfolio.
